task: Show me the options for a roundtrip leaving from Las Vegas on flexible dates on the interactive map on united.
graderReasoning: The agent reached United's 'Explore destinations' interactive map area on united.com and set the relevant search state there: origin showed 'Las Vegas LAS', search type showed 'Roundtrip', and the date control was the 'Flexible dates' mode. Evidence also shows the map region existed ('region "Map"') and the results list tied to that map was opened, displaying 20 destination options with dates and prices. The final response accurately summarized those visible options from the results list. Although there was some confusion during the process and the main booking widget remained set to San Francisco, the task specifically concerned the interactive map on United, and that map/search area was correctly configured and displayed results from Las Vegas on flexible roundtrip dates.
final_result_response:
I confirmed the United Explore form is set to:

- Flying from: Las Vegas LAS
- Search type: Roundtrip
- Dates: Flexible dates
- Max price: $2000

The results list from the interactive Explore/map area shows these roundtrip options:

1. Albuquerque, NM (ABQ): Wed, Jun 3 to Tue, Jun 9, from $197

action_history: Opening United website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.united.com/');
Setting United map origin to Las Vegas: await page.locator('e2').click();
Setting United map origin to Las Vegas: await page.locator('e54').click();
Entering Las Vegas as origin: await page.locator('e54').fill('Las Vegas');
Checking Las Vegas origin suggestions: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowDown');
Selecting Las Vegas airport and searching the map: await page.locator('e171').click();
Searching flexible roundtrip destinations from Las Vegas: await page.locator('e59').click();
Opening United destination results list: await page.locator('e59').click();
Toggling United search results list to show map: await page.locator('e59').click();
Refreshing United flexible roundtrip map search: await page.locator('e57').click();
Opening United map results list: await page.locator('e59').click();
Opening Flexible dates control on United Explore form: await page.locator('e54').click();
Selecting Flexible Dates and refreshing the map results: await page.locator('e356').click();
Closing date modal and searching flexible LAS roundtrips: await page.locator('e357').click();
Closing date modal and searching flexible LAS roundtrips: await page.locator('e57').click();
Switching from list panel back to United interactive map view: await page.locator('e59').click();
Reading United Explore search results: await page.getByRole('button', { name: /List of search results/i }).click();
